metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Sentio Labs

plugins.name: arc
plugins.description: Central issue tracker for AI-assisted coding workflows. Manage tasks, track work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

plugins.name: mneme
plugins.description: Context window protection — sandboxed execution in 11 languages, FTS knowledge base with BM25 ranking, session continuity. Single Rust binary, <5ms hooks.

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Pre-merge code quality plugin. Bundles slop-review (4-lens parallel review for AI-generated code, idiom drift, quality issues, and architecture/solution-fit) with model-tiered subagents and calibration.

plugins.name: git-spice
plugins.description: Drive git-spice stacked-branch workflows from Claude Code. Skills teach the mental model, slash commands cover the daily operations, and subagents build new stacks or repair broken ones.
